title.description: Heading for the page showing review requests.

titleWithDetails.description: Heading for the page showing review requests, with details about the filter applied.

pageNumber.description: Label for the page number in the list of review requests.

skipResults.description: Link to skip the page header and go directly to the list of review requests.

filterTitle.description: Heading for the section showing the filters for the list of review requests.

filterLanguageLabel.description: Label for the dropdown to filter the list of review requests by language.

filterLanguageAny.description: Option in the dropdown to filter the list of review requests by language.

filterFieldLabel.description: Label for the dropdown to filter the list of review requests by field.

filterFieldAny.description: Option in the dropdown to filter the list of review requests by field.

filterButton.description: Button to apply the filters to the list of review requests.

pagerNewer.description: Label for the link to the page containing newer review requests.

pagerOlder.description: Label for the link to the page containing older review requests.

noResults.message: No review requests have been published yet.
noResults.description: Text shown when there are no review requests to show.

appearHere.message: When they do, they’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Text shown when there are no review requests to show, indicating that they will appear here once published.
